name: CreepExperiment
description: Profile for creep testing experiments per DIN EN ISO 204:2023-10, capturing test conditions, parameters, and relationships to materials and data.
ExpectedUse: Comprehensive metadata for high-temperature creep tests on metallic materials, including stress rupture testing and time-dependent deformation measurements under sustained load.

Properties.Name: applicableStandard
Properties.Title: Applicable Standard
Properties.Description: Identifier or designation of a technical standard, specification, or protocol governing a procedure, test, or data format.

Properties.Name: testID
Properties.Title: Test ID
Properties.Description: Unique identifier assigned to a specific test, experiment, or measurement procedure instance.

Properties.Name: specifiedTemperature
Properties.Title: Specified Temperature
Properties.Description: Test temperature value in degrees Celsius (°C) for experimental conditions or material testing procedures.

Properties.Name: initialStress
Properties.Title: Initial Stress
Properties.Description: Applied mechanical stress value in megapascals (MPa) at the start of a materials testing experiment.

Properties.Name: testDuration
Properties.Title: Test Duration
Properties.Description: Duration of an experiment or test procedure expressed in ISO 8601 duration format.

Properties.Name: percentageCreepExtension
Properties.Title: Percentage Creep Extension
Properties.Description: Creep strain expressed as a dimensionless ratio (0-1) representing the relative elongation of a material under sustained load.

Properties.Name: SingleCrystalOrientation
Properties.Title: Single Crystal Orientation
Properties.Description: Crystallographic orientation angle in degrees (0-360) specifying the angular position of a single crystal relative to a reference axis.

Properties.Name: hasData
Properties.Title: Has Data
Properties.Description: Handle identifier(s) for data resources associated with or derived from this resource.

Properties.Name: hasMetadata
Properties.Title: Has Metadata
Properties.Description: Handle identifier(s) for metadata resources describing or accompanying this resource.

Properties.Name: usesMaterial
Properties.Title: Uses Material
Properties.Description: Handle identifier(s) for material samples or substances used in an experiment or process.
